comment: Controlled real-audio core-test corpus. Single source of truth for the audio generator (generate-voice-corpus.sh: say -> 16kHz mono WAV, ffmpeg radio degradation + speaker overlap) and the real-ASR eval (run-asr-eval.py: runs the REAL WhisperKit/Apple engine, scores WER on actual output). Controller (Daniel) vs own-aircraft pilot (Samantha) vs other aircraft (Karen/Daniel). Own call-sign N123AB / 'Three Alpha Bravo' — its pilot readbacks must be FILTERED; controller + other-aircraft + urgency must be DISPLAYED. `text` is the exact spoken reference for WER. Each clip is also rendered as a `-radio` variant (VHF AM band-pass + noise) to test wild-condition robustness; `overlaps` mix two speakers to test separation under step-on.

clips.text: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo, cleared for takeoff, runway two seven
November One Two Three Alpha Bravo, descend and maintain three thousand
Three Alpha Bravo, turn left heading two seven zero
Three Alpha Bravo, contact tower one one eight decimal seven
November One Two Three Alpha Bravo, taxi to runway two seven via Alpha, hold short runway three two
Three Alpha Bravo, squawk four six two one
Speedbird Four Two, climb flight level three one zero
Lufthansa Four Five Six, contact Munich Radar one two seven decimal eight
Cleared for takeoff runway two seven, Three Alpha Bravo
Taxi to runway two seven via Alpha, hold short runway three two, Three Alpha Bravo
Squawk four six two one, Three Alpha Bravo
Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, November One Two Three Alpha Bravo, engine failure

overlaps.text: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo, cleared for takeoff, runway two seven
Speedbird Four Two, climb flight level three one zero
